title: MARA Posts Record $123 Million Profit by Pairing Bitcoin Operations with AI Assets
text: Marathon Digital reported record profitability in Q3 2025, demonstrating the success of its diversification strategy combining bitcoin mining with emerging AI infrastructure. Q3 2025 Performance: MARA posted an earnings per share of $0.27, far surpassing the forecasted loss of $0.10. Revenue increased 92% year-over-year to $252.4 million. Bitcoin holdings nearly doubled and the company ended the quarter with over $7 billion in liquid assets. Strategic Integration: The record profit demonstrates the viability of Marathon's hybrid model combining bitcoin mining with AI and data center infrastructure. The company successfully paired its traditional bitcoin operations with higher-margin AI-related compute services. Capital Position: With $7 billion in liquid assets, MARA had substantial financial flexibility to fund strategic initiatives including the Starwood partnership and Long Ridge Energy acquisition. Future Outlook: The profitability milestone validates the company's strategic pivot toward diversified digital infrastructure, showing that energy-intensive operations can be successfully converted to serve multiple revenue streams.
